files_NOT_modified: src/renderer/game/utils/loadLayout.js (path b chosen — short-circuit not needed)

live_preview_path.reasoning: ZuzuGarageScene.createWorld() has many side effects (player ctor, NPC placement, audio, save reads, dialog triggers, upgrade-conditional renders). Re-running createWorld() mid-session against a working copy risks duplicating sprites, leaking timers, or corrupting save state. The save-only path is safer: editor's overlay tracks drags live, on Save we (1) POST the working copy to /api/save-layout, (2) update Phaser's cache.json with the new layout, (3) restart the underlying scene so it re-reads the saved positions cleanly. window.__layoutEditorWorkingCopy is still set during edit mode (per spec) but loadLayout.js was not modified — the global is a no-op for production code paths and would only be consumed by a future path-(a) extension.

verification_steps.1_npm_run_dev: Not executed (agent does not launch dev server). Expected: dev server boots, ZuzuGarageScene renders normally, F2 inactive until pressed.
verification_steps.2_press_F2: Expected: LayoutEditorOverlayScene reveals all 60 layout entries as draggable shapes (rect=blue, ellipse=purple, point=orange) with name labels, plus DOM 'Save Layout' button top-right.
verification_steps.3_click_workbench: Expected: workbench overlay highlights with white 3px stroke; previous selection (if any) reverts to its kind color.
verification_steps.4_drag_workbench_100px_right: Expected: container x advances ~100px clamped to [0, 800]; label moves with shape; underlying real workbench stays put (path b — only updates on Save).
verification_steps.5_click_save: Expected: POST /api/save-layout returns 200; button flashes green 'Saved ✓' for 2s; then editor exits, scene restarts with new positions visible.
verification_steps.6_check_json_diff: Expected: workbench.x updated to ~240; all _note fields, scene/version/_world top-level, and object insertion order preserved (we deep-clone via JSON.parse/stringify and only mutate x/y; serializer uses 2-space pretty-print + trailing newline to match repo style).
verification_steps.7_press_F2_again: Expected: overlays + save button vanish, scene continues normally; window.__layoutEditorWorkingCopy[key] is deleted.
verification_steps.8_refresh_browser: Expected: workbench at the new saved position (since the JSON file on disk now reflects the edit).
verification_steps.9_git_diff_layout_json: Expected: only the moved entry's x/y lines change (and possibly final-newline if absent originally). Schema fields all preserved. Insertion order preserved (Object.keys preserves insertion order; we never recreate the objects map).

build_result.warnings: Pre-existing chunk-size warnings (vendor-phaser, vendor-rapier, vendor-three, GamePage). No new errors.

must_not_compliance: no rotation, no shape creation, no layers, no resize, no multi-select, no grid snap, no new dependencies
schema_preservation_strategy: Working copy is a deep clone of the entire JSON (JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(data))). Editor only mutates obj.x and obj.y on drag — never touches r, w, h, _note, scene, version, _world, or any other field. Object.keys() iteration in _buildOverlays preserves insertion order, and JSON.stringify(workingCopy, null, 2) re-serializes the entire object with all original fields intact.

suggested_next_agent.rationale: phaser-scene-layout-extractor already shipped StreetBlockScene's layout JSON at commit 9e66e50. This dispatch's editor infra is now in place — adding the next scene is literally a single static-property addition (~5 LOC) plus a one-line scope statement. No editor code changes required.

notes: Editor scene constructor uses { active: true } so it boots alongside other scenes and the F2 hotkey is always live.
Editor's camera is hidden (alpha 0, visible false) until F2 enters edit mode — no rendering cost when idle.

Save click triggers a hard scene restart via this.scene.manager.getScene(targetKey).scene.restart() after writing to disk + updating cache.json — this is the cleanest way to reflect saved positions without touching createWorld() side-effects.
All editor display objects tagged occlusionRole: 'safe' per spec to avoid runtime audit flags.

Vite middleware registered synchronously inside configureServer (NOT post-hook) so it runs BEFORE the existing /api → localhost:3001 proxy. This is critical: the proxy would otherwise eat /api/save-layout requests.
